results.title: Bregman: Family support tempers election loss
results.description: Former gubernatorial candidate remains tight-lipped about future political plans

results.title: Again, Nigeria Week London honours Marvin Nmah
results.description: Nigerian Afro-Adura artiste, Ayotola Marvellous Nmah, popularly known as Marvin Nmah, has been invited to serve as a special guest presenter at the forthcoming Nigeria Week London 2026, a year after quietly receiving the platform’s Fast Rising Artiste Award. The post Again, Nigeria Week London honours Marvin Nmah appeared first on The Sun Nigeria .

results.title: Tomato Festival draws families from across SE Georgia for produce, contests, and music
results.description: A tomato contest judged by local celebrities featured prizes for the biggest, best tasting, ugliest, and overall best tomato.

results.title: ‘Horrible’: Backlash Erupts as NBC Abruptly Delays U.S. Open Coverage for Celebrity Host
results.description: Weekends during major championships are reserved for in-depth golf coverage as fans stick to their screens for the same reason. But NBC Sports’ Saturday coverage at the U.S. Open found a difficult hiccup. As Wyndham Clark’s lead carried into moving day at Shinnecock Hills, the broadcast pulled away from the live tournament for an interview [...] The post ‘Horrible’: Backlash Erupts as NBC Abruptly Delays U.S. Open Coverage for Celebrity Host appeared first on CBNC .
